|owners= |namedcrew= |captains= |registry= |aliases= |population= *[[Saff]] *[[Cecil Vane]] *[[Byra Fenn]] *[[San]] |interest= *[[Gundark's Cantina]] *[[The Credit Chip]] *[[Delgas Medical Supplies]] *[[Mechanical Allies]] |services= |sectors= *[[The Promenade (Sel Zonn Station)|The Promenade]] *[[Deep Storage Bay V14]] *[[Blue Deck]] |modules= }} The '''Sel Zonn Station''' was a [[XQ2 Platform]] that [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]]. Locations aboard the [[Space station/Legends|station]] included:
*[[The Promenade (Sel Zonn Station)|The Promenade]]: **[[Gundark's Cantina]], named for owner "Gundark" [[Saff]], was a popular meeting place for both indigenous and transient members of the station's population. **[[The Credit Chip]], [[Cecil Vane]]'s casino, offered [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] and [[Pazaak/Legends|pazaak]] games. **[[Delgas Medical Supplies]]: A corporate medical practice and pharmaceutical supplier. The chief doctor in the practice was [[Byra Fenn]]. **The [[Droid/Legends|droid]] repair and sales shop [[Mechanical Allies]], run by [[San]]. *[[Deep Storage Bay V14]] *[[Blue Deck]] ==Appearances== *{{DoD|The Traitor's Gambit}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/Mesop1|text=Message to Spacers 1: XQ2 Space Platform}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Sel Zonn Station |es=Estación Sel Zonn }} [[Category:Brentaal system locations]] [[Category:Space stations in the Arrowhead]] [[Category:Space stations in the Core Worlds]] [[Category:XQ Platforms]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Sel Zonn Station locations]] }}
